'''Yref Orgege''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who was given control of the [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] region after Moff [[Sarn Shild]] committed suicide. Orgege tried to fix the mistakes of his predecessor, namely the failed military invasion of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], by keeping his forces in tighter control. The Imperial fleet under his command could never act on its own without first checking in and receiving his okay. This gave [[Bria Tharen]] hope that certain [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] groups, specifically the organized resistance on [[Teth/Legends|Teth]] under the command of [[Winfrid Dagore]], could begin invading Imperial supply lines with impunity while the the command structure was tied up in the [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucracy]] surrounding Orgege.<ref name="Rebel Dawn" />
